title: Jensen Huang's staggering $4 trillion bet shifts Nvidia
excerpt: The warehouses of computer servers powering artificial intelligence are growing so fast that their electricity appetite is beginning to reshape household bud...
content_html:
The warehouses of computer servers powering artificial intelligence are growing so fast that their electricity appetite is beginning to reshape household budgets. 

The CEO of the company supplying most of the hardware in those facilities just laid out a projection that makes the current spending look modest by comparison.

Jensen Huang, who cofounded Nvidia (NVDA) and still runs the company, has told investors across multiple recent earnings calls that he expects global annual data-center capital expenditure to reach $3 trillion to $4 trillion by the end of the decade, CNBC reported. 

On Nvidia's first-quarter FY27 earnings call on May 20, Chief Financial Officer Colette Kress said the company expects to reach that target by the end of this decade.

Nvidia's $4 trillion forecast dwarfs the Wall Street consensus

The gap between Huang's projection and what most of Wall Street expects is striking and reveals the extent of disagreement about the trajectory of artificial intelligence spending over the next several years.

Needham analyst Laura Martin noted in a recent research report cited by CNBC that industry participants expect hyperscale cloud providers to reach about $1.03 trillion in annual capital expenditure by 2028, making Huang's figure roughly four times the prevailing consensus. 

Martin described Huang's forecast as different from the scenarios outlined by the cloud providers themselves and more ambitious in scope.

Bank of America analyst Vivek Arya now projects the total addressable market for AI data-center systems will reach approximately $1.7 trillion by 2030, according to Investing.com, up from a prior estimate of $1.4 trillion. The 21% revision reflects how quickly spending assumptions are shifting.

Nvidia's growth supports the scale of Huang's ambition

Huang speaks from the industry's center, where he has a front-row view of its trajectory.

Nvidia posted $81.6 billion in revenue during its most recent quarter, an 85% increase from the same period a year earlier, according to the company's first-quarter fiscal 2027 results. Data-center revenue alone surged 92% year over year to $75.2 billion.

Nvidia's market capitalization currently sits near $4.9 trillion, trading neck-and-neck with Apple, as CNBC reported. Apple briefly overtook Nvidia in intraday trading on July 17 for the first time in more than a year before Nvidia reclaimed the lead by the close, according to Bloomberg data.

Morgan Stanley analyst Joseph Moore wrote in a March research note cited by TipRanks that Nvidia's stock has stalled despite improving fundamentals, weighed down by doubts about its longevity.

sentences.zh: 摩根士丹利分析师约瑟夫·摩尔在 TipRanks 引用的 3 月份研究报告中写道，尽管基本面有所改善，但由于对其寿命的怀疑，英伟达的股价仍然停滞不前。

content_html_zh:
为人工智能提供动力的计算机服务器仓库增长如此之快，以至于它们的电力需求开始重塑家庭预算。

为这些设施提供大部分硬件的公司首席执行官刚刚做出了一项预测，相比之下，当前的支出显得不大。

据 CNBC 报道，Nvidia (NVDA) 联合创始人、目前仍在运营该公司的黄仁勋在最近的多次财报电话会议上告诉投资者，他预计到本世纪末，全球数据中心年度资本支出将达到 3 万亿至 4 万亿美元。

在 5 月 20 日举行的 Nvidia 2027 财年第一季度财报电话会议上，首席财务官科莱特·克雷斯 (Colette Kress) 表示，该公司预计将在本十年末实现这一目标。

英伟达 4 万亿美元的预测让华尔街共识相形见绌

黄的预测与华尔街大多数人的预期之间存在惊人的差距，这揭示了人们对未来几年人工智能支出轨迹的分歧程度。

Needham 分析师 Laura Martin 在 CNBC 引用的最近一份研究报告中指出，行业参与者预计，到 2028 年，超大规模云提供商的年度资本支出将达到约 1.03 万亿美元，这使得黄的数字大约是普遍共识的四倍。

马丁将黄的预测描述为与云提供商本身概述的场景不同，并且范围更加雄心勃勃。

据 Investing.com 称，美国银行分析师 Vivek Arya 目前预计，到 2030 年，人工智能数据中心系统的潜在市场总额将达到约 1.7 万亿美元，高于之前估计的 1.4 万亿美元。 21% 的修正反映了支出假设变化的速度。

英伟达的增长支持了黄仁勋的雄心壮志

黄在行业中心发表讲话，他对行业的发展轨迹有着最前沿的看法。

根据该公司 2027 财年第一季度业绩，英伟达最近一个季度的收入为 816 亿美元，同比增长 85%。 仅数据中心收入就同比飙升 92%，达到 752 亿美元。

据 CNBC 报道，英伟达的市值目前接近 4.9 万亿美元，与苹果并驾齐驱。 根据彭博社的数据，苹果公司在 7 月 17 日的盘中交易中，一年多来首次短暂超越了英伟达，随后英伟达在收盘时重新夺回了领先地位。

摩根士丹利分析师约瑟夫·摩尔在 TipRanks 引用的 3 月份研究报告中写道，尽管基本面有所改善，但由于对其寿命的怀疑，英伟达的股价仍然停滞不前。
